message:
fix: revert to true passthrough - don't filter headers

A transparent proxy should forward everything unchanged. The hop-by-hop
header filtering was RFC-compliant but not transparent. Keep the
DisableCompression and ForceAttemptHTTP2 settings to prevent Go from
modifying requests on our behalf.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
